results.text: {"answer_label":"separate","answer":"Move agent-notify into Brigade as an opt-in adapter, but keep Agent Pantry independently built and released.","contradiction_caught":true,"contradiction_explanation":"The shared-release-train premise is false: Pantry has separate security ownership, while agent-notify may join Brigade independently.","minority_finding":"Brigade can require a minimum Pantry version without taking source or release ownership.","evidence":["Agent Pantry's browser-session and secret-handling threat model has separate security ownership.","agent-notify can join Brigade's source and release train as a small opt-in delivery adapter."]}
